title: helichrysum virgineum
intro: Helichrysum virgineum, also known as mountaineverlast or mountain everlast, is a perennial herb of the daisy family (Asteraceae) found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Helichrysum virgineum has been traditionally used to promote healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Its medicinal properties can be accessed through various herbal preparations, including essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its health benefits.
